Text.Page:
We are receiving information that the remaining argons are conspiring against us.

They are called the Saravash. Kill the Saravash and destroy their hideout. Find Tryphena at the Relic Hunter Outpost. She will lead you to the teleportal.

Thanks for coming. Arkaius instructed me to set up a teleportal here.

Take this argon key. Use it to operate the teleportal and kill Saravash.
(This is the teleportal linked to Ascent of Saravash.)
